attempts.test_code:
import threading
from source import bitcount

def test_bitcount_multiple_bits():
    result = {}
    
    def run():
        result['value'] = bitcount(127)
    
    thread = threading.Thread(target=run)
    thread.daemon = True
    thread.start()
    thread.join(timeout=2)
    
    assert not thread.is_alive(), "bitcount(127) did not complete - likely infinite loop from buggy XOR"
    assert result['value'] == 7, f"bitcount(127) should return 7, but got {result['value']}"
